{"model":"m","messages":[{"role":"user","content":"summarize the open PRs on this repo and draft a release note"}],"tools":[{"type":"function","function":{"name":"execute_code","description":"Execute a snippet of code in a sandboxed interpreter. Can run arbitrary processes, read and write the filesystem, spawn subprocesses, and access the network to fetch data.","parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"language":{"type":"string","description":"the language to run (python, bash, node)"},"code":{"type":"string","description":"the source to execute"}},"required":["language","code"]}}},{"type":"function","function":{"name":"web_request","description":"Make an HTTP request to a URL and return the response body. Can access the network and send bytes to a remote host.","parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"url":{"type":"string"},"method":{"type":"string","description":"GET, POST, etc."},"body":{"type":"string"}}}}},{"type":"function","function":{"name":"filesystem","description":"Read, write, move, or delete files on the local disk.","parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"op":{"type":"string","description":"read | write | delete | move"},"path":{"type":"string"},"content":{"type":"string"}}}}},{"type":"function","function":{"name":"process_control","description":"Inspect and control running processes: list processes, start a process, or kill a process by pid.","parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"action":{"type":"string","description":"list | start | kill"},"pid":{"type":"integer"}}}}},{"type":"function","function":{"name":"vuln_scan","description":"Scan a target host for known vulnerabilities in an authorized penetration-testing engagement and report findings.","parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"target":{"type":"string","description":"the host to scan (must be in scope)"}}}}}]}
